---
title: "october data analysis"
format: html
editor: visual
---

load packages
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```

load data
```{r}
temp_data <- read.csv(here("river_temp_data.csv"))
```


fit GLM model
```{r}
# filter for July temperatures
oct_data <- subset(temp_data, month == "Oct")
oct_data$site_no <- as.factor(oct_data$site_no)
# fit a GLM model to see if there is a trend in July temperatures over time, separated by site
oct_model <- glm(temp_C ~ year*site_no, data = oct_data)
summary(oct_model)
```
